status_semantics.failed_closed: false-positive claim path was rejected; the candidate may be retained
status_semantics.failed_open: false-positive claim path passed when it should not; candidate invalid
status_semantics.not_applicable: control or replay mode is outside the row's declared scope
status_semantics.not_run: required status was not executed; dependent rung is blocked
status_semantics.passed: positive required condition passed for the row's declared scope
